name: agent-pipeline
description: Intelligent multi-runtime agent orchestration with DAG-planned parallelism, conditional logic, automated git hygiene, and multi-channel notifications. Supports Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Pi Agent (15+ providers with built-in tools).
